title: Basic Operations
description: A guided walkthrough of the terminal and the core loop: crew, missions, gear, and the shop.
on_start_message: Welcome aboard, Commander. This log will walk you through the basics.
on_complete_message: Basic training complete. You're on your own from here, Commander.

steps.on_start_message: This terminal is made of panels. Try splitting this one vertically: type split-v.
Now try splitting a panel horizontally: type split-h.
If you ever forget a command, type help.
steps.on_complete_message: Help panel opened. It's always there if you need it.

steps.on_start_message: Time to build your crew. Open a candidate and type hire, or use recruit hire <id>.

steps.description: Assign that recruit to a ship.
steps.on_start_message: A recruit isn't much use standing around the hangar. Assign them to a ship: ship assign <shipId> <recruitId>.
Send that crewed ship on a mission: mission start <templateId> <shipId>.

steps.description: Buy the Recruit Training Vest from the shop.
steps.on_start_message: The shop always stocks a Recruit Training Vest. Buy one: shop buy <itemId>.
Gear doesn't help anyone in the stash. Equip it from a recruit's detail panel: equip <equipmentId>.

steps.description: Buy the Encrypted Data Chip from the shop.
steps.on_start_message: The shop also always stocks an Encrypted Data Chip. Buy one: shop buy <itemId>.
Items in the stash do nothing. Load it onto a ship: ship load <shipId> <consumableId>.
Send your crew out again: mission start <templateId> <shipId>.
One more thing: type self to see your own upgrades.
